DecayAngMEC: Model of decay angle in MEC scattering
RDecBR1gamma: Scale factor on the $\Delta \to X + \gamma$ branching ratio
RDecBR1eta: Scale factor on the $\Delta \to X + \eta$ branching ratio
NonRESBGvpCC1pi: Scale factor on the non-RES $\nu$-p CC + 1$\pi$ ($W < 2$ GeV)
NonRESBGvpCC2pi: Scale factor on the non-RES $\nu$-p CC + 2$\pi$ ($W < 2$ GeV)
NonRESBGvpNC1pi: Scale factor on the non-RES $\nu$-p NC + 1$\pi$ ($W < 2$ GeV)
NonRESBGvpNC2pi: Scale factor on the non-RES $\nu$-p NC + 2$\pi$ ($W < 2$ GeV)
NonRESBGvnCC1pi: Scale factor on the non-RES $\nu$-n CC + 1$\pi$ ($W < 2$ GeV)
NonRESBGvnCC2pi: Scale factor on the non-RES $\nu$-n CC + 2$\pi$ ($W < 2$ GeV)
NonRESBGvnNC1pi: Scale factor on the non-RES $\nu$-n NC + 1$\pi$ ($W < 2$ GeV)
NonRESBGvnNC2pi: Scale factor on the non-RES $\nu$-n NC + 2$\pi$ ($W < 2$ GeV)
NonRESBGvbarpCC1pi: Scale factor on the non-RES $\bar{\nu}$-p CC + 1$\pi$ ($W < 2$ GeV)
NonRESBGvbarpCC2pi: Scale factor on the non-RES $\bar{\nu}$-p CC + 2$\pi$ ($W < 2$ GeV)
NonRESBGvbarpNC1pi: Scale factor on the non-RES $\bar{\nu}$-p NC + 1$\pi$ ($W < 2$ GeV)
NonRESBGvbarpNC2pi: Scale factor on the non-RES $\bar{\nu}$-p NC + 2$\pi$ ($W < 2$ GeV)
NonRESBGvbarnCC1pi: Scale factor on the non-RES $\bar{\nu}$-n CC + 1$\pi$ ($W < 2$ GeV)
NonRESBGvbarnCC2pi: Scale factor on the non-RES $\bar{\nu}$-n CC + 2$\pi$ ($W < 2$ GeV)
NonRESBGvbarnNC1pi: Scale factor on the non-RES $\bar{\nu}$-n NC + 1$\pi$ ($W < 2$ GeV)
NonRESBGvbarnNC2pi: Scale factor on the non-RES $\bar{\nu}$-n NC + 2$\pi$ ($W < 2$ GeV)
AhtBY: AHT parameter in Bodek-Yang DIS model
BhtBY: BHT parameter in Bodek-Yang DIS model
expskin: Horn skin depth effect on $\nu$ flux
nucleoninexsec: Secondary nucleon inelastic cross section in beam target/horn
nucleonqexsec: Secondary nucleon quasi-elastic cross section in beam target/horn
nucleontotxsec: Secondary nucleon total cross section in beam target/horn
pioninexsec: Secondary pion inelastic cross section in beam target/horn
pionqexsec: Secondary pion quasi-elastic cross section in beam target/horn
piontotxsec: Secondary pion total cross section in beam target/horn
CCQETemplateReweight_SF_1: CCQE short-range correlation reweight to Spectral Function in $q_0$
CCQETemplateReweight_SF_2: CCQE short-range correlation reweight to Spectral Function in $q_0$
CCQETemplateReweight_SF_3: CCQE short-range correlation reweight to Spectral Function in $q_0$
CCQETemplateReweight_SF_4: CCQE short-range correlation reweight to Spectral Function in $q_0$
CCQETemplateReweight_SF_5: CCQE short-range correlation reweight to Spectral Function in $q_0$
CCQETemplateReweight_CRPA_1: CCQE reweight to Continuous Random Phase Approximation in $q_0$
CCQETemplateReweight_CRPA_2: CCQE reweight to Continuous Random Phase Approximation in $q_0$
CCQETemplateReweight_CRPA_3: CCQE reweight to Continuous Random Phase Approximation in $q_0$
CCQETemplateReweight_CRPA_4: CCQE reweight to Continuous Random Phase Approximation in $q_0$
EDepFSI_MFP_pi: FSI pion mean free path (energy-dependent FSI)
RPA_CCQE: Random Phase Approximation correction for CCQE
